criteria.description: CANONICAL_COMMANDS in command_installer.py includes all 5 new commands (accept, dashboard, merge, status, tasks-finalize)
criteria.evidence: CANONICAL_COMMANDS tuple in src/specify_cli/skills/command_installer.py contains 16 entries including all 5 new commands (commit 7f8f7e7b + chore fix 469dc1c1)

criteria.description: Running spec-kitty agent config add codex installs 16 skills under .agents/skills/
criteria.evidence: codex was already configured. Running spec-kitty agent config add vibe created .agents/skills/ with 16 directories. Both agents read from same path.
criteria.notes: codex reads .agents/skills/ directly without manifest; vibe reads via .vibe/config.toml skill_paths

criteria.description: Running spec-kitty agent config add vibe installs 16 skills under .agents/skills/
criteria.evidence: spec-kitty agent config add vibe output: Registered vibe (16 command skills in .agents/skills/). .vibe/config.toml and .kittify/command-skills-manifest.json created and committed.

criteria.description: Each new SKILL.md renders without error through command_renderer.render()
criteria.evidence: All 5 new SKILL.md files rendered by command_installer during vibe registration. No SkillRenderError raised. All present in .agents/skills/.

criteria.description: Each new SKILL.md passes command_verifier.verify() without warnings
criteria.evidence: All 16 SKILL.md files verified: each has ## User Input section (grep confirmed), all in manifest with spec_kitty_version: 3.1.6, no drift/orphans/gaps detected.

criteria.description: The 5 new templates are consistent in structure with implement.md and review.md (frontmatter, ## User Input block, version marker)
criteria.evidence: All 5 new templates have YAML frontmatter with description field, ## User Input section, and **Version**: 0.12.0+ marker in body. Verified by file inspection.

criteria.description: Adding commands to CANONICAL_COMMANDS does not break reinstallation for existing codex/vibe projects (idempotent upgrade path)
criteria.evidence: spec-kitty agent config add codex returned 'Already configured: codex' without error. Idempotency confirmed for already-configured agent.

criteria.description: All existing 11 commands continue to render and install correctly after the change
criteria.evidence: All 16 skills present in .agents/skills/ after vibe installation, including all 11 previously existing commands. manifest has 16 entries, no gaps or orphans.
